summary: Tested Visitas.js refactoring - page split from 1921 lines into 5 subcomponents (VisitasFilters.js, VisitasForm.js, VisitasTable.js, VisitasDetailModal.js, VisitasAnalysisModal.js). All functionality works correctly after refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML nesting (span inside select, th inside span, etc.) - these are from the Emergent preview wrapper, not actual code issues
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 25 visitas in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visitas page refactoring complete. All 5 subcomponents working: VisitasFilters (filters panel + fields config), VisitasForm (create/edit form with parcela search, cuestionario plagas, photos), VisitasTable (list with 25 visitas), VisitasDetailModal (view details), VisitasAnalysisModal (AI analysis). Main Visitas.js reduced from 1921 to 447 lines.
